nodes._comment: === PHASE 1: PLAN (keep-as-is nodes from v1) ===
=== PHASE 1: MODIFIED — Prepare Planner Input absorbs research context ===
=== PHASE 1: MODIFIED — Planner: Build Request (positive language, no plan_document, no hardcoded tech stack) ===
=== PHASE 1: KEEP — Planner: Call LM Studio (from v1, added timeout) ===
=== PHASE 1: KEEP — Planner: Parse Response (from v1, added truncated JSON recovery) ===
=== PHASE 1: MODIFIED — Spread Tasks (absorbs Split Into Chunks, builds flat queue) ===
=== PHASE 2: CODE (single flat loop) ===
=== PHASE 2: NEW — P2: Build Code Input (pulls cached files + research from static data) ===
=== PHASE 2: MODIFIED — CW: Prepare Message (positive language, no hardcoded tech stack) ===
=== PHASE 2: MODIFIED — CW: Parse Response (minor: reads from _currentP2) ===
=== PHASE 2: NEW — P2: Prepare Write (simplified, updates file cache) ===
=== PHASE 2: KEEP — Chunk: Write Files (reused from v1, renamed to P2: Write Files) ===
=== PHASE 2: NEW — P2: Store Result + check queue ===
=== PHASE 2: NEW — P2: More? (If node, single loop gate) ===
=== PHASE 2: NEW — P2: Get Next (shifts from queue, loops back) ===
=== PHASE 3: REVIEW (full-project review, single pass) ===
=== PHASE 3: NEW — P3: Full Review Build (cross-file consistency check prompt) ===
=== PHASE 3: NEW — P3: Review Parse (checks reasoning_content fallback) ===
=== PHASE 3: NEW — P3: Needs Fix? (branches to Phase 4 or Phase 6) ===
=== PHASE 4: FIX (targeted fixes from review feedback) ===
=== PHASE 6: FINALIZE ===

return [{ json: aggregate }];
